_comment: Optional per-harness settings passthrough. Arbitrary keys here are merged into that harness's settings file and owned by agentsync (edits in config/ win; the rest of the file is preserved). Use for tool-specific prefs the four core concerns don't cover — e.g. {"claude": {"effortLevel": "high", "enabledPlugins": {...}}}. A 'hooks' object is merged ADDITIVELY alongside the determinism hooks (e.g. your own notification hooks). Leave a harness empty to passthrough nothing.
